The '''Treasury Orders Act''' was an act in the constitution of the [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances|Galactic Alliance]] that allowed for assets to be seized.

==Appearances==
*''[[Legacy of the Force: Sacrifice]]'' {{1st}}
